title: Kept
description: KEPT: What Remains When the Noise Stops A visceral theatre piece tracing a life rebuilt through rhythm, memory, and art. From a young man “kept” in the charged intimacy of a Chicago summer to the grief that follows years later in Amsterdam, KEPT journeys through desire, loss, and restoration. Drawing on years in percussive theatre and storytelling, it transforms lived experience into sound — using rhythm and story to explore the ways we break, stray, and begin again, and the things that refuse to disappear.

venue.name: BN1 Arts Centre CIC
venue.address: New England Street, New England Street, East Sussex
